title: Vidiyale Vaa
desc: The host provides information on various trending topics related to fitness, technology, finance, society, economy and culture and interviews experts on them.

title: Snehithiye
desc: The host engages in discussions on topics related to women's issues, along with home and lifestyle tips.

title: Azhagi
desc: Sundari, a widow, raises her three children, Natraj, Mathi and Surya with love and support amidst several hardships. But, things turn bad in the family when Natraj gets married to a rich girl.

title: Nadhaswaram
desc: Gopi, the owner of a tailor shop and son of Chokkalingam, a Nadaswaram player, goes about his daily life, with several ups and downs, along with his family.

title: Kolangal
desc: Abhinaya, a hardworking woman, faces several hardships because of the people around her, including Adhitya, her stepbrother.

title: Thendral
desc: A young girl named Thulasi dreams of continuing her education despite living with a middle-class family that shuns her.

title: Pirivom Santhippom
desc: Natesan, an engineer, gets married to Visalatchi who likes his joint family. After he moves to a hill station for his work, his wife becomes a victim of loneliness and ends up taking sleeping pills.

title: News
desc: The host provides the latest information, advancements, and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Varuthapadatha Valibar Sangam
desc: Two fun-loving youngsters Bosepandi and his friend create a lot of nuisance to the villagers. After having fallen for the daughter of the village chief, Bosepandi needs to use his wits to marry her.

title: Thillu Mullu
desc: Talented comedians perform hilarious, theme-based skits centred around relatable daily struggles that leave the audience in splits.

title: News
desc: The host provides the latest information, advancements, and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Katrathu Samayal
desc: The host presents a wide range of delicious recipes, demonstrates their preparation and shares useful culinary tips with the viewers.

title: Gauri
desc: A girl blessed by the goddess Masani lives in the village where two landlords belonging there plan to kill her for their benefit.

title: Kalyana Parisu
desc: This is TV Show - Drama Category.

title: Malai Malai
desc: Two inseparable brothers, Panlanivel and Vetrivel, live as a farmer and a driver in a village. However, their lives take a turn when Vetrivel locks horns with a notorious gangster in the city.
